testcase.name: test_copyright

skipped.message: No copyright header has been placed in the generated source file.

testcase.skipped: /home/jetson/dobot-magician/src/magician_ros2/dobot_bringup/test/test_copyright.py:20: No copyright header has been placed in the generated source file.

testcase.name: test_flake8
